name: Fresh Fig Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh figs, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and cloves.
4. Blend the sifted dry ingredients into the creamed mixture using a spatula or wooden spoon.
5. Gently fold in the chopped figs and walnuts until evenly distributed.
6. Shape the dough into spoonfuls of cookie dough and place them on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
